race.comment: PRUCIA (13) was much better last time at Toowoomba when beaten a neck. Is unbeaten over this track and trip, and reunites with Looker, who has partnered both wins. Bold showing anticipated. SUPER SIOUX (1) returns shoulders a handy fresh record. Draws the car park, so will need some luck from out there under the big weight. KATE'S TIARA (4) returns and shoulders two first-up wins to her name. Loves this trip and is already a winner here. The 3kg claim aids the big weight and she looks a great chance. KAWATIRI (15) drove hard to get the bob last start at Quirindi. Draws the A1 this time and gets in light with the claim. Can play another major role.
